title: PoopSky
description: Introducing revolutionary pooping functionality to your Minecraft!
body:
**POOPSKY**

Introducing revolutionary pooping functionality to your Minecraft!

_Note: This mod does not include an skyblock, you need to install it yourself_



**Basic Functionality**

✦ Toilet - Players will automatically defecate when squatting on this block

✦ Poop - Functions the same as Bone Meal, but has additional effects when used on poop block

✦ Urine - Use an glass bottle to right-click a toilet to get urine, feed it to a chicken to get a water
bottle

✦ Fecal Incontinence Potion - Made from rotten rotten flesh, forces the affected entity to defecate on its own



**New profession**

♻ PoopMaker Villager - Used to trade poop related items



**Unique Items**

✈ Toilet Plug - Available through villager trading, this is a flying mobile device

🔗 Toilet Linker - Connect toilets across dimensions for instant entity/item transport




You can add mod to modpack without telling me
